response.justification: Despite extensive full-stack and geospatial experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ or Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, which are core requirements; their C++ exposure is limited to academic/legacy NI LabWindows work, and their GIS work uses DLang and Node.js, not the required stack for routing tiling.
strengths: Strong open-source geospatial project experience with GISCollective
Proven ability to work across diverse tech stacks and systems
Demonstrated expertise in data pipelines and real-time systems via DLang and microservices
concerns: No commercial C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or map tiling
Geospatial work uses DLang/Node.js, not the required C++/Linux stack
Lacks demonstrated expertise in distributed systems for routing data consistency
